lang.title: Choose your language
hero.bio:
I'm a designer specialized in UX and service design. I believe in the power of design and art to create experiences that don't just work, but resonate.

Curious by nature, passionate about sports and travel, I enjoy experimenting with AI tools as creative companions in my workflow and drawing inspiration from methods and frameworks across other disciplines to nurture and grow my creative thinking.
hero.h1.desc: Specialist in UX, service design, and digital product. I create experiences that don't just work — they resonate.

projects.title: Projects
projects.ublo.desc: France-based platform helping property managers run their portfolios efficiently.
projects.bellpi.desc: E-commerce platform aimed at transforming the buying and selling experience of used vehicles.
projects.bnf.desc: Web application designed to create a digital twin showcasing the architectural heritage and collections of the BnF Richelieu site.
projects.jumbomana.desc: AI assistant guiding travelers through their search for information at Lyon–Saint-Exupéry international airport.
projects.andy.desc: Branding, website and experience improvements for an electrical services company in the United States.
projects.paramo.desc: Experimental project focused on creating an immersive experience inspired by natural ecosystems.

cv.exp.freelance.title: Freelance: Brand & UX Designer / Andy Electric, USA (2025-2026)
cv.exp.freelance.items:
• Redesign and evolution of the company's brand identity, ensuring visual consistency and positioning.
  • Design of communication and marketing materials (social media, visual content, key messages).
  • Creation and development of a showcase website presenting the company's services and activities.
  • Integration of contact solutions to facilitate lead generation.
  • Contributing to improving digital presence and attracting new clients.
cv.exp.ublo.title: Work-study: UX Designer / Ublo, France (2024-2025)
cv.exp.ublo.items:
• Conducting user research, needs analysis and translation into product specifications (user stories, acceptance criteria, JTBD).
  • Performing UX audits and assessing product maturity to propose an improvement roadmap prioritised by impact.
  • Daily collaboration with tech, business and marketing teams to align constraints, value and feasibility.
  • Participating in product discovery: opportunity identification, hypothesis formulation, prototyping and user testing.
cv.exp.iridian.title: Full-time: Product Designer / Iridian, Colombia (2023-2024)
cv.exp.iridian.items:
• Design and optimisation of web and mobile interfaces aligned with product KPIs and business objectives.
  • Implementation of a design system and an iteration workflow based on testing, data and user feedback.
  • Collaboration with marketing and tech teams for developing new features and generating leads.
  • Participation in product evolution prioritisation through analysis of technical constraints, data and client feedback.
cv.exp.casatoro.title: Full-time: UX & Service Designer / Casatoro, Colombia (2021-2022)
cv.exp.casatoro.items:
• Facilitating design workshops, collecting user insights to guide product development and organising usability tests for continuous improvement.
  • Designing phygital solutions (touch kiosks, screens, apps) based on insights and usage-driven approaches.
  • Cross-functional collaboration with design, tech and business teams to maintain constant product alignment.
cv.skills.items:
• Use of AI tools.
  • Quantitative and qualitative data analysis in the design process and key metrics.
  • Roadmap definition and prioritisation (RICE, MoSCoW, Kano).
  • Product discovery, JTBD, needs analysis, writing user stories and acceptance criteria.
  • Product vision and stakeholder alignment.
  • KPI tracking, quantitative and qualitative analysis.
  • Use of methodologies such as Design Thinking, Human-Centered Design, Lean UX, Scrum and Design Sprint.
  • Wireframes, prototypes, user testing, UX audits.
